title: Neg's monster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Negbeast.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] fights Neg's monster.]]
'''Neg's monster''' was a large, furry, [[Unidentified furry humanoid creature|ferocious creature]] owned by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Neg]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] in circa [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

When Neg captured the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] child [[Tomo]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] was enlisted by the boy's desperate [[Tomo's mother|mother]] to rescue him in [[Captain Neg's house]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] attempted to rescue Tomo from his cage quietly, but the monster broke out of its own cage and attacked, forcing Qui-Gon to kill it.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:NegsMonsterModel.png|thumb|left|250px|Model asset of Neg's Monster]]
The player only fights the beast if completing the Tomo side-quest. This article assumes the player did so.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] {{1st}}
